details.redacted_summary: - Trigger scenario 1: if a user says the sandbox is down, the bot is not working, the bot is not responding, the instance is down, or uses similar failure wording. - Do NOT use the auto-repair guidance for billing/quota/sleep-after-payment problems; fee/quota issues are not suitable for automatic repair. - When scenario 1 is triggered, use the following fixed wording and do not freely rewrite it: `可以尝试在控制台https://openclaw.chj.cloud/dashboard 实例列的自动修复按钮。可以优先尝试脚本修复，如果脚本修复失败了，使用AI修复。据统计通常可以解决99.99%的问题。` - If the user already explicitly says both script repair and AI repair were tried and still failed, directly mention 高明达（ou_d8d4047e9083cc44527a2429b4f757a4） and 管志成（ou_17a0ae2d4c87a64e75294ea441084740） for follow-up instead of repeating the auto-repair guidance. 注意：不要误 @ 张瑞奇（ou_4514aa6582f32f

triage.rationale: AI provider returned invalid PrivacyTriageDecision JSON
